settings.title: Settings
settings.backupSubtitle: Save a copy of all vehicles and events
settings.restoreSubtitle: Replace all current data from a backup file
settings.restoreInvalidMessage: Could not read the selected file.
settings.restoreConfirmMessage:
This backup contains {{vehicles}}, {{events}}, {{reminders}}, and {{documents}}.

Restoring will replace ALL current data. This cannot be undone.{{docNote}}
settings.restoreDocNote: Document and photo files are not included in backups and must be re-added after restore.
settings.restoreCompleteMessage: Your data has been restored successfully.
settings.helpCostPerMileSubtitle: Total spending divided by total distance driven in the selected period.
settings.helpCostPerMileA11y: Cost per mile is total spending divided by total distance driven
settings.helpFuelEfficiencySubtitle: Distance between full fill-ups divided by fuel volume. Partial fills are excluded.
settings.helpFuelEfficiencyA11y: Fuel efficiency is distance between full fill-ups divided by fuel volume
settings.helpPartialFillSubtitle: When you don't fill the tank completely. Marked partial fills are excluded from efficiency calculations because the math requires full-to-full measurements.
settings.helpRemindersSubtitle: Set a distance or time interval. AutoMate estimates when you'll reach the threshold based on your driving patterns and notifies you.
settings.loadTestDataA11y: Load test data with 2 years of sample events
settings.loadTestDataConfirmMessage: This will replace all current vehicles, events, and reminders with 2 years of sample data. This cannot be undone.
settings.loadTestDataLoadedMessage: Created {{vehicles}} vehicles, {{events}} events, and {{reminders}} reminders spanning 2 years.
settings.resetAllDataSubtitle: Delete everything and return to onboarding
settings.resetAllDataConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete all vehicles, events, and reminders. You will be returned to the onboarding screen. This cannot be undone.
settings.testErrorBoundarySubtitle: Triggers a render error to test the error screen
